services/git-bridge/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a recent snapshot compatible with Java 21.
services/git-bridge/pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may lack support for the --release flag or Java 21 bytecode generation.

services/git-bridge/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace source/target configuration with release flag for Java 21 compilation.
services/git-bridge/pom.xml.why_exists: The source/target flags are deprecated in favor of release for cross-compilation and module path handling in modern JDKs; using source/target with JDK 21 may cause warnings or incorrect class file versions.

services/git-bridge/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
services/git-bridge/pom.xml.why_exists: Guava 19.0 is too old and may contain bugs or lack support for newer Java APIs; 29.0-jre is a stable version supporting modern JREs.

services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(int) with List.getFirst() to align with Java 21 API conventions.
Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
Replace string concatenation with text blocks for multi-line SQL string definition.
services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.before:
"CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `projects` (\n" +
"  `name` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',\n" +
"  `version_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\n" +
"  PRIMARY KEY (`name`)\n" +
")"
services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.after:
"""
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `projects` (
  `name` varchar(10) NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
  `version_id` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  PRIMARY KEY (`name`)
)"""

services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Refactor instanceof check to use pattern matching for cleaner code.
services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.before: if (cause instanceof HttpResponseException && (((HttpResponseException) cause).getStatusCode() == HttpServletResponse.SC_UNAUTHORIZED || ((HttpResponseException) cause).getStatusCode() == HttpServletResponse.SC_FORBIDDEN))
services/git-bridge/src/main/java/uk/ac/.after: if (cause instanceof HttpResponseException exception && (exception.getStatusCode() == HttpServletResponse.SC_UNAUTHORIZED || exception.getStatusCode() == HttpServletResponse.SC_FORBIDDEN))

services/git-bridge/src/test/java/uk/ac/.general_idea: Replace deprecated Runtime.exec(String) with Runtime.exec(String[]) to avoid deprecation warnings in Java 21.
Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for modern Java 21 API usage.
Remove unused import java.nio.file.Paths after migrating to Path.of().
Refactor multi-line string concatenation to use Java 15+ text blocks for better readability.
Refactor second multi-line string concatenation to use Java 15+ text blocks for better readability.
Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for URI conversion.
